name: New Orleans Beignet Doughnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sprinkle yeast over warm water; stir to dissolve.
2. Add sugar, salt, eggs, and evaporated milk. Blend with a rotary beater until smooth.
3. Gradually add 4 cups of sifted flour, mixing continuously.
4. Add shortening and beat in the remaining flour until a dough forms.
5. Cover the bowl and chill for several hours.
6. Heat oil for frying to 360°F (180°C).
7. Drop portions of the chilled dough into the hot oil.
8. Fry for 2 to 3 minutes, or until lightly browned on each side.
9. If the beignets do not rise immediately when dropped into the oil, adjust the temperature and fry again.
10. Remove from oil with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
11. Sprinkle heavily with confectioners' sugar.
12. Serve hot.
